title: Sustainability Fundamentals: Concepts, Policy, and Navigating Transitions
description:
The Sustainability Fundamentals: Concepts, Policy, and Navigating Transitions online course introduces you to the multidimensional nature of sustainability and the transition from unsustainability to sustainability. You will learn about different perspectives on sustainability and why it can be such a contested topic of discussion. You will also explore sustainability transitions and the frameworks that shape them. Finally, you will investigate the power dynamics and politics behind these transitions and how different interests can influence the way sustainability initiatives are devised and implemented.  
 To explore these and related topics in more depth, consider enrolling in the full  Sustainability: Environment, Economy, and Society  online certificate course from the London School of Economics and Political Science. It offers a deeper look into sustainability transitions, economics, and development and places emphasis on translating academic theory into informed practices in industry and policymaking. This course offers you the opportunity to learn from leading sustainability researchers and engage with the diverse experiences of leading practitioners in the field.
institutions: The London School of Economics and Political Science
